summary: Frontend-only UI/UX validation of the Masterliqours dark-neon redesign. Home, navbar, hero, category chips, products grid, product detail, login (customer + super_admin + master_admin), dashboard, admin tabs, register form, footer, and floating WhatsApp all render correctly with the Bebas Neue / hot-pink / cyan / lime / gold styling, Manglish copy, and data-testid coverage. One CRITICAL bug found: cart contents are wiped on any full page reload due to a useEffect race condition in CartProvider (localStorage is overwritten with [] before hydration completes). Two minor issues: noisy 401 console errors from /api/auth/me when no token is present, and no visible success/error feedback after newsletter form submit.

minor.issue: Returns 401 on home/initial mount when user is anonymous (no token). Frontend calls this unconditionally; not breaking but produces 2-6 console 401s on every public page load. Either guard the call in AuthProvider or have backend return 200 with {user:null}.

ui_bugs.issue: useEffect race condition: the 'save to localStorage' effect runs on initial mount with cart=[] BEFORE the hydration effect's setCart has re-rendered, overwriting any saved cart with '[]'. Verified by seeding localStorage with a cart item then navigating to /cart via full reload - cart is empty and localStorage shows '[]'. Real-world impact: any browser refresh on /cart, /checkout, or product pages permanently loses the user's cart.
After submitting footer-newsletter-input + clicking footer-newsletter-btn, no visible success/error toast or inline message is rendered. User has no feedback whether subscription succeeded.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking product-card-add-btn-{id} correctly updates localStorage in the SAME page session, but the cart is reset to empty on the next full page load due to the CartProvider hydration bug above. Checkout flow works only if user navigates entirely via SPA links without refreshing.

issues: Renders excellently: Bebas Neue 'SPEND & WIN THE NIGHT.' headline with hot-pink WIN glow, manglish subtext 'Top quality drinks dengan harga best. Order now, settle via WhatsApp lah!', 'Shop Now Lah' pink pill, ghost 'Chat With Us', and 500+/24h/5K+ stats glowing cyan/lime/gold — matches spec.
Marquee animates correctly with manglish copy (boss/lah/settle/dengan/terus).

action_items: FIX CART HYDRATION BUG (CRITICAL): In /app/frontend/src/context.js CartProvider, replace `const [cart, setCart] = useState([]);` + separate load useEffect with a lazy initializer: `const [cart, setCart] = useState(() => { try { const s = localStorage.getItem('cart'); return s ? JSON.parse(s) : []; } catch { return []; } });` and delete the loader useEffect at lines 60-65. This eliminates the race where the save effect fires before hydration.
Add a guarded /api/auth/me call in AuthProvider (only call when a token exists in localStorage) to remove noisy 401s on public pages.
Add success/error toast or inline message to footer newsletter submit (currently silent).
Optional: same lazy-init pattern should be applied to any other localStorage-backed contexts (auth token) to prevent similar regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: CartProvider useEffect race is a textbook bug — always use lazy useState initializer for localStorage hydration to avoid the save-effect-clobbers-storage race.
ProductDetail.js, Products.js, SuperAdminDashboard.js have react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings (non-blocking but should be cleaned up by wrapping load functions in useCallback).
Calling /api/auth/me without a token guard creates avoidable 401s on every page view for anonymous users.
Newsletter form has no UX feedback — silent submits hurt conversion.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (all UI renders, all data-testids present, all logins succeed, all dashboards load; the one critical functional bug is cart persistence on reload)

test_credentials: Used customer1@test.com / Test123!, yash@masterliqours.my / Admin123!, jojo@masterliqours.my / Admin123! - all logged in successfully.
seed_data_creation: Seeded a fake cart entry in localStorage to reproduce the CartProvider hydration bug. No backend seed data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend was validated in iteration_1 (18/18). This iteration_2 validated the new dark-neon frontend. PASSING: announcement bar, navbar (gold logo + search + sign-in pill + cart), hero (Bebas Neue + Shop Now Lah + Chat With Us + 500+/24h/5K+ stats), 9 category chips (cat-chip-Wine etc), 15+ product cards with product-card-add-btn-{id}, /products page with 10 filter-cat-* chips and search, /product/:id with pd-add-to-cart-btn 'Add to Cart Boss', /cart with cart-checkout-btn (when items present in-session), customer /dashboard tier+points+progress, super admin /admin tabs (admin-tab-banners/products/flash-sales), master admin /master, /register form with all 4 testids, floating WhatsApp with correct wa.me/60126884925 href, manglish copy throughout. FAILING: cart wiped on browser reload (CartProvider bug), no newsletter UX feedback, noisy 401s on /api/auth/me. After main agent applies the lazy-useState fix for CartProvider, re-test the full add-to-cart → reload → /cart → /checkout → place order → checkout-assigned-staff + checkout-whatsapp-btn flow end-to-end (this iteration could not reach the place-order step because cart was empty after reload).
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause of cart-empty-on-reload: in /app/frontend/src/context.js CartProvider, useState is initialized to [] and two useEffects are declared in order: (1) hydrate from localStorage with [] deps, (2) save cart to localStorage with [cart] deps. Both fire after the first render. Effect (1) calls setCart(saved) which only schedules a state update. Effect (2), running synchronously in the same commit phase with the stale cart=[] closure, immediately writes '[]' to localStorage, clobbering the saved value before the re-render with the hydrated value occurs. Reproduction: `localStorage.setItem('cart', JSON.stringify([{product_id:'X',price:100,quantity:1}]))` then full-reload /cart -> items=0 and localStorage='[]'. Mitigation: convert useState([]) to lazy initializer that reads localStorage synchronously and delete the hydration useEffect, ensuring the cart value is correct on the very first render before the save effect runs.
